Wade buys three sandwiches and two drinks for his road trip to the [location]. The drinks cost four dollars each so the total for drinks is eight dollars. He spent twenty-six dollars in total so the sandwiches cost eighteen dollars combined. Each sandwich costs six dollars which is the price he paid at the [store] lab.
***
The [driver] needs to know the [cost] for future trips to the [destination]. He can now calculate the total expense for any number of sandwiches easily.
